summary: Event logging system initialized. Autonomous build session starting.

G gave green light. Autonomous build session begins. Budget: $40. Goal: complete > perfect.

Sprint 005 PASSED. Real-time polling, active sprint indicator, heartbeat system, animated stats, progress bar, notifications. Build clean.

AUTONOMOUS BUILD SESSION COMPLETE. 6 sprints, 0 failures, ~37 min total dev time.
Phase 2 begins. 5 sprints queued (007-011). G approved, building autonomously.

Sprint 009 PASSED. Builder wizard: 3-step flow, prompt-to-contract generation, editable form, priority trilemma, QA tier cards, cost estimates, drafts system.

PHASE 2 COMPLETE. 5 sprints (007-011), all passed first round. ~29 min total dev time.
